title: cuscuta stenolepis
intro: Cuscuta stenolepis, also known as Dodder vine, is a parasitic plant species that grows by attaching itself to other plants and absorbing their nutrients. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine and has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cuscuta stenolepis include its ability to improve fertility in both men and women, reduce stress and anxiety, and support immune function. Cuscuta stenolepis is commonly prepared as a herbal supplement in capsule or powder form, and it can also be used as a tea or tincture.
